description_long: This object is a classic double-barrel shotgun with an over-under barrel configuration, featuring two long, parallel barrels stacked vertically. The barrels are finished in a dark, likely blued metal, and are joined by a visible rib along the top. The stock is made of polished wood, extending from the butt to the fore-end, and has a traditional full stock design with a smooth, ergonomic contour. The trigger guard is rounded and metallic, protecting a single visible trigger. The fore-end and grip areas show subtle texturing for improved handling. The overall design is sleek and functional, typical of sporting or hunting shotguns found in urban or rural environments.
description: A polished wood and metal over-under double-barrel shotgun with a full stock and rounded trigger guard. The design is sleek, with vertically stacked barrels and a classic sporting appearance.
description_view_0: The shotgun is seen from the muzzle end, showing the two stacked barrels and the narrow profile of the fore-end.
description_view_1: A full side view reveals the over-under barrel configuration, polished wooden stock, and the elongated, sleek form of the shotgun.
description_view_2: Viewed from the butt, the shotgun's full stock and the vertical alignment of the barrels are visible, emphasizing the over-under design.
description_view_3: The opposite side view mirrors view 1, displaying the same over-under barrel arrangement and wooden stock.
attribute_barrel_configuration: over-under double-barrel with a visible rib along the top; both barrels are of equal length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized metallic guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
